description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1), traveling northeast on Hubbell Street toward 7th Street in San Francisco, stopped next
 to parked vehicles with active hazard lights to pick up a passenger. Shortly after, one of the parked vehicles (Vehicle 2) was attempting to 
pull out of the parking spot when the Zoox vehicle's passenger approached and activated its doors. The Zoox vehicle's right rear door 
contacted Vehicle 2's front bumper.  The right rear door on the Zoox vehicle was damaged; no injuries were reported, and police were not 
notified.
Print
Clear Form
